infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses your microphone to record voice samples and listen for voice commands while reading the Qur'an.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to understand voice commands for hands-free Qur'an recitation control.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Qur'an Voice Reader to access your microphone for voice training and commands.
Allow Qur'an Voice Reader to access your microphone for voice search and commands.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Qur'an Voice Reader to recognize your speech for hands-free Surah search.
